blocks.text: Read the file rust/Cargo.toml and tell me the workspace members

<tool_use>
<server_name>__claude_local</server_name>
<tool_name>read_file</tool_name>
<input>{"file_path": "rust/Cargo.toml"}</input>
</tool_use>

The workspace members defined in `rust/Cargo.toml` are:

1. **`crates/rusty-claude-cli`** — The CLI binary
2. **`crates/runtime`** — The runtime library
3. **`crates/core`** — Core types/functionality
4. **`crates/tool-exec`** — Tool execution
5. **`crates/tools`** — Tool definitions
6. **`crates/mcp-client`** — MCP client implementation
